description: Create a restricted internal user and role in the Wazuh indexer (OpenSearch) for a compliance auditor using the REST API (https://localhost:9200). Configure the internal user 'compliance_auditor' with password 'AuditP@ss2024!', description 'PCI-DSS compliance auditor read-only account', and backend role 'auditors'. Define a role named 'compliance_read_alerts' with 'cluster_composite_ops_ro' cluster permissions and read/search permissions for index patterns 'wazuh-alerts-*' and 'wazuh-monitoring-*', then map the 'compliance_auditor' user to it. Save the API response for the user to '~/auditor_user_check.json', the role to '~/auditor_role_check.json', and a successful test query response (authenticated as the new user) to '~/auditor_access_test.json'.
